guidelines.guideline_description: Use Case Diagrams may include only Actor and Use Case classifiers.
Actor classifiers must be located outside any System Boundary fragment.
Use Case classifiers must be enclosed within at least one System Boundary fragment.
Association relations connect only an Actor classifier to a Use Case classifier.
Include relations must originate from a base Use Case and target another Use Case for mandatory shared behavior.
Extend relations must originate from an extending Use Case and target a base Use Case for conditional or optional behavior.
Generalization relations link classifiers of the same kind, either Actor-to-Actor or Use Case-to-Use Case.
A System Boundary fragment defines a subject and must group only Use Case classifiers relevant to that subject.

agent1_capabilities: When should I use an «include» relationship instead of an «extend» relationship in a Use Case Diagram?
Is it valid to connect two Actors with an Association relationship?
Can a Use Case exist outside of a System Boundary in UML?
How do I model role hierarchies using Generalization in Use Case Diagrams?
Can a Use Case appear in multiple System Boundary fragments?
